title: OMV Announces New Investment in Large 140 MW Green Hydrogen Plant
content: OMV has taken the final investment decision on 140 MW green hydrogen project in Lower Austria, one of Europeâ€™s largest electrolysis plants. Production expected by end of 2027 with an annual output of 23,000 tons of green hydrogen, supplying OMVÂ´s Schwechat refinery. Investment of a mid-three-digit million-euro sum in Bruck an der Leitha, Lower Austria, subject to and under the assumption of a positive outcome of the European and Austrian Hydrogen Bank auction.
author: Analysts Account
